name: DNR Diamonds - Sell Your Gold, Jewelry & Diamonds
description_short: DNR Diamonds buys diamonds, gold, jewelry, and watches for same-day cash at locations in NYC and Chicago's jewelry districts.
description_long: DNR Diamonds is a jewelry buyer established in 1994 with a long operating history in the diamond and precious metals industry. The company operates as a wholesale diamond manufacturer and importer with physical locations in the heart of New York City and Chicago's jewelry districts, positioning itself as a trusted buyer for individuals looking to liquidate jewelry and precious items. The company's business model centers on purchasing diamonds, gold, fine jewelry, watches, and estate pieces directly from consumers, with a stated focus on providing fair market value and same-day payment options. DNR Diamonds differentiates itself by emphasizing its 30-year track record, professional appraisal process, and multiple payment methods (cash, check, ACH transfer, wire transfer). The company's website highlights customer testimonials praising responsive service, fair pricing, and professional handling of valuable items. However, as a jewelry buyer operating on a retail/wholesale model, DNR Diamonds' valuations depend on current commodity prices and their own profit margins—consumers should understand that buying prices are typically below retail resale value. The company's service is geographically limited to two metropolitan areas, and like all jewelry buyers, there is inherent subjectivity in gemstone and watch valuation.
address: 20 W 47th St Suite 507, New York, NY 10036

company_info.headquarters: 20 W 47th St Suite 507, New York, NY 10036

pros: Same-day cash payment available upon offer acceptance
Established since 1994 with 30-year operating history in diamond/jewelry industry
Multiple payment options: cash, check, ACH transfer, and wire transfer
Located in NYC and Chicago jewelry districts with physical storefronts for in-person evaluation
Accepts a wide range of items: diamonds, gold, jewelry, watches, and estate pieces regardless of condition
Offers remote valuation option (can email images for preliminary assessment)
Positive customer reviews citing fair pricing and professional, responsive service
cons: Limited geographic availability—only NYC and Chicago locations
Buying prices will be below retail/resale value due to wholesale business model and dealer margins
No transparency on their appraisal methodology or how prices are determined on the public website
Valuation is subjective and may vary significantly between different evaluators
No stated credentials or certifications visible for gemologists performing appraisals
best_for: Individuals in NYC or Chicago needing immediate cash from jewelry/diamond liquidation
Estate liquidators looking to quickly convert inherited jewelry to cash
Watch collectors selling luxury timepieces (Rolex, Cartier, etc.)
People with scrap gold or broken jewelry wanting convenient local evaluation
diagnosis: DNR Diamonds is best for consumers in NYC or Chicago who need quick cash for jewelry, diamonds, or watches and prefer in-person evaluation from an established buyer. The primary caveat is that buying prices will always be substantially lower than retail value—this is appropriate only for urgent liquidity needs, not for maximizing resale proceeds.
services: Gold buying in any form or shape
Luxury watch buying (Rolex, Cartier, and other brands)
In-person evaluation at NYC or Chicago locations
Secure handling and professional appraisal of valuables
